scripts.build:android:local:debug: npm run prebuild:android && cd android && set GRADLE_USER_HOME=..\.gradle-home&& gradlew.bat assembleDebug --no-daemon --no-parallel -Dorg.gradle.workers.max=1
scripts.build:android:local:release: npm run prebuild:android && cd android && set GRADLE_USER_HOME=..\.gradle-home&& gradlew.bat assembleRelease --no-daemon --no-parallel -Dorg.gradle.workers.max=1
scripts.clean:gradle: if (Test-Path mobile/android/.gradle) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force mobile/android/.gradle }; if (Test-Path mobile/.gradle-home) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force mobile/.gradle-home }
